checklist: Drawing title block should state the governing drawing/GPS standard.
Drawing should contain scale, revision, material, part number, and sheet fields.
Critical dimensions should have explicit tolerance or a referenced general tolerance.
Datum identifiers referenced in feature control frames should be defined on the drawing.
Feature control frames should contain a characteristic, tolerance value, and required datum references.
Surface texture indications should use recognized parameter names and numeric values.
Notes should avoid ambiguous language such as typical, approximate, or as required unless internally allowed.
